documents.title: Use FlexSearch for Full-Text Search
documents.summary: spec.md needs fast, in-memory full-text search across all documents. The search must support multi-field querying (title, body, tags, headings) and return results within 200ms.

documents.title: Use SvelteKit with Svelte 5 Runes
documents.summary: spec.md needs a web framework for building a documentation browser with server-side rendering, filesystem access, and API routes. The framework must support:

documents.title: Use unified/remark/rehype for Markdown Rendering
documents.summary: spec.md needs to render Markdown documents to HTML with support for GFM (GitHub Flavored Markdown), syntax highlighting, and extensibility for future plugins.

documents.title: spec.md Documentation
documents.summary: A Git-native documentation browser that reads Markdown files with YAML frontmatter from a `docs/` folder and serves them as a navigable, searchable site with light/dark themes.

documents.title: Configuration
documents.summary: spec.md is configured through a `.specmd.yml` file placed in the root of your docs directory.

documents.title: Getting Started
documents.summary: This guide walks you through setting up spec.md for local development and using it to browse documentation.

documents.title: API Reference
documents.summary: spec.md exposes REST API endpoints for programmatic access to documentation.

documents.title: Architecture Overview
documents.summary: spec.md is a SvelteKit application that reads Markdown files from a filesystem and serves them as a documentation site. Phase 1 implements a read-only browser.
